# Solution Setup

Use the `calculator-setup` skill as the source of truth for this workflow. The
skill owns the setup procedure, required package versions, bundled script,
starter templates, validation commands, and troubleshooting guidance.

## Required Action

Run the calculator setup skill workflow to create or verify the .NET 8
calculator solution under `src/workspace/calculator-xunit-testing/`.

The workflow must remain limited to solution setup. Do not implement calculator
operations, data-driven tests, CSV migration, PostgreSQL setup, CI/CD, or later
prompt stages while handling this prompt.

## Success Criteria

The workflow is complete when the skill reports that setup succeeded, build
verification passed, and test discovery works for the calculator solution.

## References

- Skill: [calculator-setup](../skills/calculator-setup/SKILL.md)
- Setup script: [Set-DotnetCalculatorSolution.ps1](../skills/calculator-setup/scripts/Set-DotnetCalculatorSolution.ps1)
- Calculator template: [Calculator.cs](../skills/calculator-setup/templates/Calculator.cs)
- Test template: [CalculatorTest.cs](../skills/calculator-setup/templates/CalculatorTest.cs)
